name: Spring Cloud Stream
description: Structure documentation for Spring Cloud Stream binding configuration

structures.name: BindingProperties
structures.description: Configuration properties for a single message channel binding

fields.name: destination
fields.description: Topic or exchange name on the broker

fields.name: group
fields.description: Consumer group name for durable subscriptions

fields.name: binder
fields.description: Named binder to use (Kafka or RabbitMQ)

fields.name: partitioned
fields.description: Whether receiving from a partitioned producer

fields.name: maxAttempts
fields.description: Max retry attempts before dead-letter routing

fields.name: partitionKeyExpression
fields.description: SpEL expression for determining partition key

fields.name: requiredGroups
fields.description: Consumer groups guaranteed to receive messages
